# Vicen AI

> Vicen AI is a real-time social chat platform with AI-powered group rooms, a study assistant for math, physics, and past papers, and built-in AI moderation.

Vicen AI combines a personal AI chat assistant with moderated group chat rooms. Users can create or join rooms with a 6-character code, send text and voice messages, take notes, review past papers, and get step-by-step help on academic problems.

## Pages

- [Home — Chat with Vicen AI](/): Personal AI chat with adaptive answers, live web search, and academic problem-solving.
- [Group Chat](/group-chat): Create or join public and private group rooms with real-time messaging, voice notes, and AI moderation.
- [Notes](/notes): Save subject-tagged study notes.
- [Past Papers](/past-papers): Upload and revise past exam papers.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Practice quiz mode across subjects.

## Optional

- [Settings](/settings): Personal preferences and account.
